name: Gang District
short_description: Gang District is a local multiplayer shooter party game with a share screen mechanism. Pick up a weapon and start blasting and kick some tail!
detailed_description:
Gang District is a local multiplayer shooter party game with a share screen mechanism. Pick up a weapon and start blasting and kick some tail!

Gang District supports the Steam Remote Play feature. But it is built to play locally.

It has 28+ weapons and 12 maps at this stage.

Weapons are randomly spawning at specific locations with a percentage chance for each weapon to spawn. While maps are selectable at any time of the game.

There are currently 6 mini boss weapons. If you are lucky enough, you might have them and win the game.

Gang District is developed by a sole developer.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Arabic, Korean
